hooks.command: input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'git commit'; then echo '🔍 Running pre-commit checks...' >&2; cd /home/user/LUMI && flutter analyze && flutter test && echo '{"continue": true}' || echo '{"continue": false, "stopReason": "Pre-commit checks failed: flutter analyze or flutter test did not pass. Fix the errors above before committing."}'; else echo '{"continue": true}'; fi
